title: Saudi Arabia, Egypt sign deal to waive short-stay visas for official passport holders
summary_full: Saudi Arabia and Egypt have signed a new agreement to exempt holders of official passports from short-stay visa requirements. This initiative aims to facilitate travel for government officials and representatives, simplifying procedures for diplomatic and institutional engagements. The move underscores a commitment to strengthening bilateral cooperation and enhancing communication between the two nations.
